name: What's my occupational illness case worth if I can't work anymore from chemical exposure?
description: Lost wages, medicals, disability rating—often $50K+ for permanent cases.[9]

mainEntity.name: What's my occupational illness case worth if I can't work anymore from chemical exposure?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lost wages, medicals, disability rating—often $50K+ for permanent cases.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Value depends on medical costs, lost wages (up to 312 weeks at 2/3 rate), permanent disability rating, and pain.[9] Utah caps partial disability but totals can reach six figures for severe cases like lead poisoning.[1] Key factors: impairment percentage from doctor, future care needs, age, and wage history. Calculate using Labor Commission guidelines, factor settlements; many exceed $100K with strong proof. Get a rating evaluation early.
